title: 2 Weeks Statistics
content:
I’ve always thoughts that most of the visitors are regular readers. "ShortStat":http://shortstat.shauninman.com/ has proven me wrong. 2 weeks of log  indicates that more than 50% of the visitors to the site are **crawlers / spiders** (programs that scan the web in order to create "catalog entries" for search engines). Should I be glad?

!-/gallery/ss/ss-0501-01.gif!

!-/gallery/ss/ss-0501-02.gif!

While we're at it, let's talk about the **search keywords**. Many visitors found this site by searching on some specific terms. Many of them are political related (no surprise there) but some of the terms is rather disturbing. Let's see some of them. (Modified to shorten the output.)

!-/gallery/ss/ss-0501-03.gif!

"Mini stat":shortstat/mini.php is available if you really want to know. %(me)I was thinking about doing monthly statistics recap but then I think it's just easier to post the link here.%

That's it for today.
Have a good day.
